text:
There once was a kid named Benny who dreamed of being a magician. Every weekend, Benny would sneak away to the local library’s rare books section to read about ancient mystical arts. One peculiar book spoke of a mysterious figure known only as The Raven King. Legend had it that the king could move objects with his mere gaze, turning lead into gold.

One stormy night, Benny’s kite got caught in a blizzard. Panic-stricken, he ran home to find his beautiful gold-glassed kite broken beyond repair. That’s when he decided to seek out The Raven King. After reading countless tales of wonder, Benny convinced the king that he loved treasure forever.

The Raven King flew Benny up into the sky, where he whispered ancient commands. To his astonishment, a gluttonous golden goose fell out of the clouds. Benny handed the bird precious jewels, reasoning that even a goose deserved treasure. The Raven King smiled ominously.
